subject: feat(auth): add OAuth2 PKCE flow for mobile clients
body: Replaces password-grant. Requires kid header on JWT to support key rotation.

subject: fix(billing): correct proration when downgrading mid-cycle
body: Previously refunded the full month; now prorates from change date.

subject: refactor(storage): split fragments table out of monolithic schema
body: Cleaner FK ownership; required for the upcoming scope-hierarchy migration.

subject: perf(retrieval): switch BM25 lookup to fts5 contentless table
body: Cuts query latency from 18ms to 3ms on the production corpus.

subject: feat(rag): chunk markdown by heading instead of fixed line windows
body: Better semantic boundaries; ingest is slightly slower but recall@5 up 12 points.

subject: fix(scope): honor .skein/scope pin in `recall` CLI subcommand
body: Previously fell back to default_scope when run from a pinned project.

subject: style: run black + isort across the package
docs(architecture): document the lease coordination model
body: ADR-0007. Explains why we picked advisory leases over CRDTs.

subject: feat: add `skein doctor --perf` self-measurement
body: Runs the bench suite against the live daemon and prints p50/p95.

subject: test(retrieval): add hit@5 fixtures for hybrid RRF
